source_section.title_label_raw: Residential Use Requirements Combination of Uses in Established Residential Zones

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements Combination of Uses in Established Residential Zones

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Combination of Uses in Established Residential Zones
provisions.text: Where permitted in Table 1B, only one of the following uses shall be permitted, at any time, on a lot in an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH- 1 zone:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Combination of Uses in Established Residential Zones
provisions.text: home occupation use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Combination of Uses in Established Residential Zones
provisions.text: short-term bedroom rental use (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23); or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Combination of Uses in Established Residential Zones
provisions.text: repealed (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements Combination of Uses in Established Residential Zones
provisions.text: daycare use. Small Shared Housing Use in Established Residential Zones

sections.title_label_raw: Repealed (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22)
provisions.text: Repealed (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Home Occupation Uses

sections.title_label_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade- related dwelling unit use, a home occupation use shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: be limited to one per lot; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: not be permitted within a multi-unit dwelling use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: The following uses are permitted as a home occupation use:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: broadcast and production studio use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: catering use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: makerspace use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: grooming and haircutting salon;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: medical clinic use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: office use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: pet daycare use, limited to a maximum of 5 animals;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: pet grooming;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: studio use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: tailoring and shoe repair;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: tattooing; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: tutoring.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: The retailing of products that are accessory to a permitted home occupation use, listed in Subsection 51(2), is permitted.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: The principal operator of a home occupation use shall reside on the lot where the use is located.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: The number of permitted employees for a home occupation use, that are not a resident of the lot, is limited to one.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: Any home occupation use shall be wholly contained within a dwelling unit or an accessory structure.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: A home occupation use shall not be apparent from the outside of the dwelling unit or the accessory structure, except for permitted signage.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: The maximum floor area for a home occupation use is 35% of the dwelling unit's floor area, to a maximum of 50.0 square metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: Signage requirements for a home occupation use are:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: in any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, or CDD-1 zone, contained in Section 466; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: in any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, contained in Section 469.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Excluding a home occupation use contained within a grade-
provisions.text: Motor vehicle parking requirements for a home occupation use shall comply with Section 433. Home Office Uses

sections.title_label_raw: Home office uses are permitted in all dwelling units.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Home office uses are permitted in all dwelling units.
provisions.text: Home office uses are permitted in all dwelling units.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Home office uses are permitted in all dwelling units.
provisions.text: The principal operator of a home office use, and any employees, shall reside on the lot where the use is located.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Home office uses are permitted in all dwelling units.
provisions.text: Any home office use shall be wholly contained within a dwelling unit or an accessory structure, and shall not be apparent from the outside of the dwelling unit or accessory structure.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Home office uses are permitted in all dwelling units.
provisions.text: No signage is permitted for a home office use. Short-term Rentals Uses

sections.title_label_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be permitted in all zones provided that the dwelling unit is the primary residence of the short-term rental operator. (RC- Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: Short-term Bedroom Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be permitted in all zones, subject to the following additional provisions: (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: The short-term bedroom rental shall be wholly contained within the dwelling unit which is the primary residence of the operator of the rental; (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: Not more than three (3) bedrooms, or the maximum number of bedrooms specified in the zone, may be rented as a short-term bedroom rental at the same time; (RC- Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: Signage requirements for a short-term bedroom rental use are: (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: in any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, or CDD-1 zone, contained in Section 466, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: in any ER-3, ER-2, or ER-1 zone, contained in Section 468;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: Motor vehicle parking requirements for a bed and breakfast use shall comply with Section 433; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Short-term Rentals accessory to a residential use shall be
provisions.text: The operator of the short-term bedroom rental resides on site while any bedrooms are rented. (RC-Feb 21/23;E- Sep 1/23) Daycare Uses in the ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use
provisions.text: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use shall meet the following requirements:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use
provisions.text: A maximum of one daycare use is permitted on any lot containing a low-density dwelling use or a cluster housing use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use
provisions.text: The principal operator of a daycare use shall reside in the dwelling unit where the daycare use is located, and may employ additional staff;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use
provisions.text: Excluding staff and the principal operator, a maximum of 14 people may attend a daycare use at any time;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use
provisions.text: Any outdoor recreational spaces or play areas, accessory to a daycare use, shall meet the screening requirements of Subsection 423;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use
provisions.text: Signage for a daycare use shall comply with Section 469; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within an ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a daycare use
provisions.text: Motor vehicle parking requirements for a daycare use shall comply with Section 433.

sections.title_label_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) Backyard Suite Uses

sections.title_label_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D, a lot may contain only one backyard suite use, within the rear yard only, in conjunction with: (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: a single-unit dwelling use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: a two-unit dwelling use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: a semi-detached dwelling use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: a three-unit dwelling use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: a townhouse dwelling use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: a four-unit dwelling use; (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: a duplex apartment use; or (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: a small shared housing use. (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: A backyard suite use shall meet the accessory structure built form and siting requirements of Sections 327 to 333, except as provided in Subsection 56(8). (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: A backyard suite use shall have unobstructed access that ((RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: connects the backyard suite to a street;

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: is located on the same lot on which the backyard suite use is located; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: has a minimum width of 1.1 metres.

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: A backyard suite use shall not be counted towards the dwelling unit total.

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: A backyard suite use may be occupied by a small shared housing use, except for a backyard suite use that is permitted under Clause 56(1)(h). (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) (RCCC- Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: A backyard suite shall be permitted accessory to a non- conforming structure for residential use, except where no residential uses are permitted in the zone. (RC- May 23/24;E- June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: If a backyard suite use is permitted in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D,
provisions.text: Internal conversion of an existing non-conforming accessory structure to a backyard suite use is permitted and exempted from the requirements in Part V, Chapter 19, providing the floor area of the backyard suite does not exceed 93.0 square metres. (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) Maximum Number of Bedrooms in the ER-3 or ER-2 Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4), on a lot zoned ER-3 or ER-2, the following are the maximum number of bedrooms permitted by land use:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a single-unit dwelling use or duplex apartment use, 6 bedrooms per lot; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a semi-detached dwelling use, 4 bedrooms per dwelling unit; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a townhouse dwelling use, 4 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 20 bedrooms per townhouse block; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a two-unit dwelling use, 8 bedrooms per lot;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a three-unit dwelling use, 10 bedrooms per lot;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a four-unit dwelling use, 12 bedrooms per lot;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a multi-unit dwelling use with 5 dwelling units, 4 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 14 bedrooms per lot; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a multi-unit dwelling use with 6 dwelling units, 4 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 16 bedrooms per lot; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a multi-unit dwelling use with 7 dwelling units, 4 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 18 bedrooms per lot; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a multi-unit dwelling use with 8 dwelling units, 4 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 20 bedrooms per lot; and (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a small shared housing use in an ER-2 zone, 6 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 8 bedrooms per lot. (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: For small shared housing uses in one or more dwelling units on a lot zoned ER-3, the following are the maximum number of bedrooms permitted by lot area: (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a lot that is less than 375.0 square metres, 6 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 12 bedrooms per lot; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a lot that is at least 375.0 square metres but less than 450.0 square metres, 10 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 14 bedrooms per lot; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a lot that is at least 450.0 square metres but less than 525.0 square metres, 10 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 16 bedrooms per lot; (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a lot that is at least 525.0 square metres but less than 600.0 square metres, 10 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 18 bedrooms per lot; and (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: for a lot that is at least 600.0 square metres, 10 bedrooms per dwelling unit and 20 bedrooms per lot. (RCCC-Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25) (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: All bedrooms in a backyard suite use are not counted towards the maximum number of bedrooms permitted in Subsection 57(1). (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Except as provided in Subsections 57(2), 57(3), and 57(4),
provisions.text: An internal conversion of an existing main dwelling under Section 63 is not subject to Subsection 57(1). (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

sections.title_label_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) Maximum Number of Bedrooms on Lots with Multiple Residential Uses in an ER-3 or ER-2 Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)
provisions.text: If a lot in an ER-3 or ER-2 zone contains a small shared housing use and another residential use that is not a small shared housing use, the total number of bedrooms for all the dwelling units on the lot must not exceed the maximum number in Subsection 57(2). (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) (RCCC- Sep 4/24;E-Apr 17/25) Maximum Number of Bedrooms for a Multi-Unit Dwelling Use within the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A)

sections.title_label_raw: Within the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A), as shown on Schedule

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A), as shown on Schedule
provisions.text: Within the Young Avenue Sub-Area A (YA-A), as shown on Schedule 3C, a multi-unit dwelling use having up to 5 units shall have a maximum of 15 bedrooms per lot.

sections.title_label_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

sections.title_label_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24) Internal Conversion within the ER-3 or ER-2 Zone

sections.title_label_raw: A main building within the ER-3 or ER-2 zone may be internally

provisions.heading_context_raw: A main building within the ER-3 or ER-2 zone may be internally
provisions.text: A main building within the ER-3 or ER-2 zone may be internally converted to a three-unit dwelling use, four-unit dwelling use, or multi- unit dwelling use, if the building satisfies all of the following: ((RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: A main building within the ER-3 or ER-2 zone may be internally
provisions.text: the building existed on the coming into force date of this By-law;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A main building within the ER-3 or ER-2 zone may be internally
provisions.text: there is no increase in the height or volume of the building;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A main building within the ER-3 or ER-2 zone may be internally
provisions.text: Repealed (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: A main building within the ER-3 or ER-2 zone may be internally
provisions.text: excluding the replacement of an existing exterior staircase, no new exterior staircase shall be erected in a front yard. Dwelling Unit Mix - New Buildings

sections.title_label_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units shall provide a dwelling unit mix as follows:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: in a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, or COR zone, no less than 25% of all dwelling units shall be required to contain a minimum of two bedrooms; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: in any HR-2 or HR-1 zone:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: no less than 20% of all dwelling units shall be required to contain a minimum of two bedrooms, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: no less than 5% of all dwelling units shall be required to contain a minimum of three bedrooms.

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: The number of required dwelling units:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: in Subsection 64(1), shall be rounded up to the nearest whole number; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: in Subclause 64(1)(b)(ii), shall not be counted towards the requirement of Subclause 64(1)(b)(i).

provisions.heading_context_raw: A new building that contains a minimum of 40 dwelling units
provisions.text: Notwithstanding Subsection 64(1), requirements for dwelling unit mix shall not apply for a new building that begins construction before April 1, 2028. (RC-Dec 11/25;E- Feb 2/26) Dwelling Unit Mix - Additions

sections.title_label_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a building that existed on the coming into force date of this By- law, shall provide a dwelling unit mix of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: in a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, or COR zone, no less than 25% of all dwelling units within the addition shall be required to contain a minimum of two bedrooms; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: in any HR-2 or HR-1 zone:

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: no less than 20% of all dwelling units within the addition shall be required to contain a minimum of two bedrooms, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: no less than 5% of all dwelling units within the addition shall be required to contain a minimum of three bedrooms.

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: The number of required dwelling units:

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: in Subsection 65(1), shall be rounded up to the nearest whole number; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: in Subclause 65(1)(b)(ii), shall not be counted towards the requirement of Subclause 65(1)(b)(i).

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: For an existing building that is the subject of an addition that results in less than 40 dwelling units, no required dwelling unit mix applies.

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: For an existing building that is the subject of an addition that results in 40 dwelling units or more for the entire building, and which does not comply with Subsections 65(1) and 65(2), then the dwelling unit mix after the addition shall not increase the non-conformity with the unit mix that existed prior to the addition.

provisions.heading_context_raw: An addition that contains 40 dwelling units or more, on a
provisions.text: Notwithstanding Subsections 65(1) and 65(4), the requirements for dwelling unit mix shall not apply for an addition to an existing building that results in 40 dwelling units or more for the entire building, providing construction begins before April 1, 2028. (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26) Dwelling Unit Mix - Internal Conversions

sections.title_label_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40 dwelling units or more, shall provide a dwelling unit mix of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: in a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, or COR zone, no less than 25% of all dwelling units shall be required to contain a minimum of two bedrooms; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: in any HR-2 or HR-1 zone:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: no less than 20% of all dwelling units shall be required to contain a minimum of two bedrooms, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: no less than 5% of all dwelling units shall be required to contain a minimum of three bedrooms.

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: The number of required dwelling units:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: in Subsection 66(1), shall be rounded up to the nearest whole number; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: in Subclause 66(1)(b)(ii), shall not be counted towards the requirement of Subclause 66(1)(b)(i).

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: An existing use that meets the definition of large shared housing use that existed on the coming into force date of this By-law may be converted to a multi-unit dwelling use, without having to meet the requirements of Subsection 66(1) and Section 67, if the number of existing bedrooms and the volume of the building are not increased.

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: Excluding grade-oriented premises on a pedestrian-oriented commercial street, as shown on Schedule 7, internal space in a building that contains a high-density dwelling use may be permitted to be converted to additional dwelling units, without having to meet the requirements of Subsection 66(1) and Section 67, if:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: the building and the high-density dwelling use existed on the coming into force date of this By-law;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: the space being converted was not previously used as a dwelling unit or amenity space; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: there is no increase in the height or floor area of the building.

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: Internal space in a building that contains a commercial use may be permitted to be converted to one or more dwelling units without having to meet the requirements of Subsection 66(1) and Section 67, if

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: the building existed before November 27, 2019;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: the building is in a DD or DH zone;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: the space being converted was not previously used as a dwelling unit or amenity space; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: there is no increase in the height or floor area of the building. (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: A change of use in an existing building that results in 40
provisions.text: Notwithstanding Subsection 66(1), the requirements for dwelling unit mix shall not apply for any change of use in an existing building that results in 40 dwelling units or more, providing construction begins before April 1, 2028. (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26) Amenity Space - High-Density Dwelling Use

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a high-density dwelling use that has at least 40 units shall be required to provide amenity space that is consistent with all of the following: (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: at least 5.0 square metres per dwelling unit;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: for use by the building's residents; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: at least 50% of the amenity spaces be provided indoor. (RC- May 23/24;E-June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: Subject to subsection 67(5), an addition to a building containing a high-density dwelling use that has at least 40 units shall be required to provide amenity space, for the addition only, at a rate of 5.0 square metres per dwelling unit, for use by the building's residents. No less than 50% of all required amenity space shall be provided within the building. (RC- May 23/24;E- June 13/24) (RC-Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: Except for outdoor amenity space associated with an individual dwelling unit within a high-density dwelling use, such as balconies, all amenity space required by Subsections 67(1) and 67(2) shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: be provided in increments of no less than 30.0 contiguous square metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: have no linear dimension less than 3.0 metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: be available for shared use by the building's residents.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: For any high-density dwelling use within an HR-2 or HR-1 zone, a minimum of 25% of the required amenity space shall be:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: provided outdoors;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: located at-grade or on a roof top; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: available for shared use by the building's residents.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to subsection 67(5), any new building containing a
provisions.text: Subsections 67(1) and 67(2) shall not apply to 22 and 24 Brule Street, Dartmouth (PID 0037176 and 0037184). (RC- Dec 11/25;E-Feb 2/26) Amenity Space - Cluster Housing Use

sections.title_label_raw: A cluster housing use shall be required to provide amenity

provisions.heading_context_raw: A cluster housing use shall be required to provide amenity
provisions.text: A cluster housing use shall be required to provide amenity space at a rate of 5.0 square metres per dwelling unit, but in no case shall there be less than 20.0 square metres provided on the lot.

provisions.heading_context_raw: A cluster housing use shall be required to provide amenity
provisions.text: All amenity space required in Subsection 68(1) shall:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A cluster housing use shall be required to provide amenity
provisions.text: subject to Clause 68(2)(b), be provided in increments of no less than 20.0 contiguous square metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A cluster housing use shall be required to provide amenity
provisions.text: where more than one increment of 20.0 square metres is required, one contiguous area of less than 20.0 square metres is permitted;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A cluster housing use shall be required to provide amenity
provisions.text: have no linear dimension less than 3.0 metres; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A cluster housing use shall be required to provide amenity
provisions.text: be available for shared use by the residents of the cluster housing use. Ground Floor Uses for Buildings Containing A Multi-Unit Dwelling Use on Non Pedestrian- Oriented Commercial Streets

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following commercial or institutional uses are permitted in a work-live unit:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: broadcast and production studio use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: catering use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: makerspace use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: medical clinic use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: office use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: personal service use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: pet daycare use; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: studio use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: The retailing of products that are accessory to a permitted commercial use or institutional use in a work-live unit, listed in Subsection 70(1), are permitted.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: No more than 50% of the total floor area of a work-live unit, to a maximum of 140.0 square metres, may be used for one of the uses listed in Subsection 70(1).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: The uses listed in Subsection 70(1) shall be located on the ground floor.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: The principal operator of a commercial use or an institutional use within a work- live unit shall reside in the unit and may have no more than three non-resident employees.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: Signage for a work-live unit shall meet the requirements of Section 466.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 70(3), only one of the following
provisions.text: Motor vehicle parking for a work-live unit shall comply with the requirements of Section 433.
